_comment: Live loop state. The PM updates this at the end of every tick. Survives context resets.
_paused_note: Set paused:true to make the loop go straight back to sleep without doing work. The kill switch — the user can stop the team without stopping the loop itself.
_escalations_note: Tasks the quality loop could not pass within its round budget. The PM must surface these to the user rather than let them silently look done.
_paused_reason: PAUSED by director 2026-07-17 09:36: '일단 작업 중지해줘. 내가 레퍼런스를 찾아줄게' — he will supply a reference for the building FORM direction. Work halted cleanly; nothing in flight. RESUME when he sends the reference + says '루프 재개': set paused=false and /tick. STATE: Library 'stack-of-books' direction reached v3 (docs/design/spike-library-form-v3.png) — bottom 3 books read clearly as hardcover books (his 'make it look like a book' fix landed), but the open-book CROWN on top reads messy (sprawls + stray strip); that crown is the open item, plus applying the archetype to the other buildings (Gym=barbell) once form is locked. Pastel tone APPROVED. Renders history: v1 weak, v2 slabs, v3 books-good/crown-messy. Frugal path (single client-dev agent ae38e5432a455370b reusing BuildingKit) is the proven cheap loop for building iterations — do NOT run full workflows per building (3x token directive).
